name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
Cut into bite-size strips
9 oz boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into bite-sized strips
1. Wrap tortillas in foil. Place in a 300°F oven for 10-12 minutes or until heated through.
2. Meanwhile, spray a large skillet with Pam cooking spray. Add onion and garlic; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
3. Add red or green pepper; stir-fry for 1-2 minutes more or until veggies are tender-crisp. Remove from skillet.
4. Add oil to skillet. Add chicken; stir-fry 3-5 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink. Return veggies to skillet.
5. Add salsa. Cook and stir until heated through.
6. To serve, divide chicken mixture evenly among tortillas. Top with shredded lettuce. Dollop with yogurt and sprinkle with green onion. Roll up tortillas and serve.
